steps.title: Compare the spreads visually
steps.content:
Standard deviation measures spread from the center. Compare the histograms by spread, not by the exact height of each bar:
  • Team A's scores are clustered in a narrower interval.
  • Team B's scores are spread over a wider interval, including more values near the low and high ends.

steps.title: Interpret spread as standard deviation
steps.content: A narrower distribution has a smaller standard deviation, and a wider distribution has a larger standard deviation. Therefore, Team A's standard deviation is less than Team B's. That matches choice A.
